title: Module 3 CDSG Case Bundle Schema
description: Executor-facing case bundle schema for Module 3 CDSG hard-rule inference. The schema is intentionally compatible with the existing unified case_bundle_schema while exposing the nodule facts consumed by the Clinical Decision State Graph.

case_id.description: Stable case identifier consumed by the CDSG executor.

subject_id.description: Patient or subject identifier linked to the case.

radiology_facts.description: Existing Module 1/2 radiology fact records. The executor reads radiology_facts[].nodules[] as the canonical nodule source.

subject_id.description: Subject identifier associated with the source radiology fact.

report_text.description: Source report text used only for provenance and evidence tracing.

nodules.description: Structured nodule facts consumed by symbolic hard matching.
Optional normalized nodule facts. This field is not required because the current repository stores nodules under radiology_facts[].nodules[].

multiple_nodules.description: Optional case-level multiplicity flag. When absent, the executor derives multiplicity from available nodule counts.

risk_flags.description: Optional patient-level or case-level risk flags used by later Module 3 versions.

high_risk_screening.description: High-risk screening status derived from smoking eligibility when available.

heavy_smoker.description: Qualitative or normalized heavy-smoking flag. M3-1 records it but does not run semantic fallback.

smoking_eligibility.description: Existing smoking eligibility block. Missing smoking information is non-blocking for the M3-1 Lung-RADS hard-rule path.

source_confidence.description: Optional case-level source confidence. Per-nodule confidence is preferred when available.

nodule_id_in_report.description: Nodule identifier within the source report.

size_mm.description: Measured nodule size in millimeters. This is a blocking fact for M3-1 hard-rule inference.

density_category.description: Normalized density category, e.g. solid, part_solid, ground_glass, calcified, fat_containing, unclear. Missing or unclear density is a blocking fact in M3-1 CDSG.

solid_component_mm.description: Optional explicit solid-component size for part-solid nodules.

change_status.description: Temporal change status, such as new, stable, increased, or decreased.

change_text.description: Source text supporting temporal change extraction.

spiculation.description: Spiculation flag. M3-1 records it but does not implement 4X logic.

evidence_span.description: Source evidence span used to ground matched conditions.

recommendation_cue.description: Report recommendation cue, retained for evidence only. The CDSG executor never copies it as the final recommendation.

confidence.description: Per-nodule source confidence from the upstream extractor.

missing_flags.description: Per-nodule missing flags from upstream extraction.
